content_of_post_to_comment:
today is sunday and every sunday i make a plan then every monday I feel unstoppable and then by thursday i am gone

then comes the guilt and then another fresh start lol

i am so done

so instead of trying to fix it alone again

so i am looking for 1-2 people who want to rebuild their lives together over the next 90 days

not motivation, just consistency

What we will do:

• check in every day (5 mins)

• share day's goals

• share what actually got done

• do focus sessions together whenever possible

• be honest when we mess up

• never disappear without saying anything

My goals:

fix sleep schedule

workout/train 4-5 days every week

study/focus sessions every day

stop doomscrolling

eat healthy

become someone who finishes what we start

About me:

26M from India (IST)

interested in fitness, finance, productivity, psychology, nutrition, and learning.

not looking for someone who's already successful

looking for someone who's sick of wasting their own potential

If you are serious, send me a DM with:

age

country

1-3 habits you are finally ready to fix
